products.name: Magnetic Mount Kits
products.descriptor: Magnetic antenna mounting kits for vehicles and unmanned ground systems

evidence.snippet:
2\. Magnetic Mount Kits
-----------------------
Our [magnetic mount kits](https://www.southwestantennas.com/products/antenna-mounting-kits/magnetic-mounts) are ideal for use with omni-directional antennas and can be secured to vehicles, unmanned ground systems, or ferromagnetic objects such as metal desks, metal plates and beams, or other surfaces.

unresolved_questions: Corpus covers only 6 of 649 pages (~1%); 643 product pages skipped — actual SKU count is in the hundreds based on crawl_index URL patterns.
No explicit NDAA Section 889/848 compliance claim found for any product; all products marked not_disclosed based on 'Designed and Manufactured in San Diego, California' footer.
No Blue UAS Cleared List mention anywhere in corpus.
Permanent Vehicle Mounts appears as a separate category in the nav header (/permanent-vehicle-mounts) but is not in the footer product list and could not be cited within the 60-word limit.
RF Coaxial Goosenecks family contains many additional SKUs beyond the two accessories cited (different lengths, OD, and connector configurations).
